arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Nottingham Forest: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Chelsea are aiming to extend their impressive winning streak on Sunday when they host Nottingham Forest in the Premier League. Chelsea were given two difficult afternoons by Forest last season, with the Midlands side winning 1-0 at Stamford Bridge before the Blues avenged their defeat in a 3-2 win at the City Ground.

arts.ttl: Confirmed Nottingham Forest team to play Chelsea in the Premier League
Chelsea ‘express serious interest’ in signing ‘Road Runner’ speedster who tormented them last season
arts.sum: Chelsea are on the lookout for a new wide-attacker and have identified Borussia Dortmund’s Karim Adeyemi as the ideal target. The 22-year-old is enjoying an impressive breakthrough with Dortmund and is quickly emerging as one of Europe’s most exciting talents. arts.ttl: Full Chelsea squad for Nottingham Forest as Enzo Maresca triple decision works wonders
arts.sum: Cole Palmer, Wesley Fofana and Romeo Lavia are three notable first-team players excluded from the squad for the tournament meaning they are well rested. Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca will continue to have a long list of options to choose from for today's Premier League clash with Nottingham Forest.
